subject: UX & Research
title: Research Repositories
description: A quick win: understand Research Repositories.

hook.text: Your team did 50 studies last year. Can you find the onboarding insight from study 23? Nobody can.

buildup.text: Research repositories store insights, not reports. Each finding is tagged, searchable, and linked to evidence.

discovery.text: Tools like Dovetail and EnjoyHQ let teams build searchable libraries organized by theme and product area.

twist.text: Repositories fail when nobody maintains them. Most become abandoned graveyards within a year.

climax.text: Make insight logging part of the research process, not extra work. Capture during analysis or lose it.

punchline.text: Insights forgotten are wasted. Build a searchable research library.

quiz.question: Why do most research repositories fail within a year?
options: Nobody maintains them — adding insights takes discipline that most teams don't sustain
The tools are too expensive to keep running
